prompt: Transform the file names into a series of encrypted ciphers.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. In the terminal window, replace all visible file and directory names (e.g., 'a.out', 'compiler', 'denoising.c', '9march1.cpp', 'homework_ds', etc.) with random, unreadable characters that visually resemble encrypted ciphers. Ensure all instances of file and directory names displayed in the terminal output are transformed.
objects: Command line prompts within the terminal (e.g., `raju@raju-HP-Laptop-15-bs1xx:~$ ls`)
File permission and metadata text within the terminal (e.g., `-rw-r--r--`, `raju raju`, file sizes, dates, times)
Encrypted-cipher-like characters (replacing original file and directory names)
Terminal window title bar (with "Activities Terminal" text and control buttons)
Terminal application menu bar (with "File Edit View Search Terminal Help")
